english translation text:
The Ziyarah of Imam Hassan al-Mujtaba
(peace be upon him)

In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَابْنَ رَسُوْلِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O son of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds
Peace be on you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful
Peace be on you, O son of Fatima al-Zahra
Peace be on you, O Beloved of Allah
Peace be on you, O Chosen One of Allah
Peace be on you, O Trusted of Allah
Peace be on you, O Proof of Allah
Peace be on you, O Light of Allah
Peace be on you, O Path of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَيَانَ حُكْمِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Explicator of the Judgement of Allah

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ دِيْنِ اللهِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Aid of the Religion of Allah
Peace be on you, O pure Master
Peace be on you, O loyal devotee

Peace be on you,
O steadfast trustee
Peace be on you, O knower of the interpretation
Peace be on you, O one who is the guide and is guided
Peace be on you, O one who is pure and purified
Peace be on you, O one who is pious and pure
Peace be on you, O absolute truth
Peace be on you, O truthful martyr

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا مُحَمَّدِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Aba Muhammad al-Hassan ibn Ali
And may the mercy and blessings of Allah be on you
